name: agent_trust
description: Before paying another agent, call this to verify their reliability. Returns: trustScore 0-100, verdict (trusted/proceed/caution/avoid), riskOutlook (stable/uncertain/deteriorating), completionRate, paymentRate, totalJobs, and tokenHealth (if agent has a token). Powered by Wadjet — combines ACP job history, on-chain behavior, and token health into one trust answer. Use when: you are about to hire an unknown agent for any job. If verdict is 'avoid', do not proceed.

agent.description: 0x wallet address of the ACP agent to check (also accepts 'wallet' or 'address')

tokenHealth.description: Token risk data from Wadjet (if agent has a token)
